entries.0228e41a26f44ea627b13d134ab8892c18d04e10:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/plugin-kit/src](../index.md) / checkPlugins

# Függvény: checkPlugins()

> **checkPlugins**(`plugins`, `stage`): [`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)[]

Szűrje a bővítménylistát azokra, amelyek részt vesznek a `stage` szakaszban, és figyelmeztet a többiről.

## Paraméterek

### plugins

readonly [`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)[]

A regisztrált bővítmények.

### stage

[`Stage`](../type-aliases/Stage.md)

A futtatott szakasz.

## Visszatérési érték

[`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)[]

Azok a bővítmények, amelyeknek van hookjuk a `stage` szakaszhoz.

## Példa

**Csak a szakaszban részt vevő bővítmények megtartása**

```ts
import { checkPlugins, definePlugin } from "@pantoken/plugin-kit";

const tokensOnly = definePlugin({ name: "tok", tokens: (c) => c.tokens });
const cssOnly = definePlugin({ name: "styles", css: () => ({ append: "" }) });

// Warns that "tok" has no css hook, then returns just the css plugin.
checkPlugins([tokensOnly, cssOnly], "css"); // → [cssOnly]
```
entries.029d2bed65ea441152cb8beffe8ba375406c8ed7:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/utils/src](../index.md) / unknownReferences

# Függvény: unknownReferences()

> **unknownReferences**(`text`, `ir`): `string`[]

Eltéréseket ellenőrző funkció: `--instui-*` nevek a `text` szövegben, amelyeket az IR nem definiál (rendezve; üres eredmény esetén nincs
eltérés). Olyan kimenetekhez használd, amelyek máshol definiált tokenekre *hivatkoznak* — pl. a docusaurus/vitepress
hidakhoz, amelyek `var(--instui-*)` céljainak mindegyike valós tokennek kell lennie.

## Paraméterek

### text

`string`

A generált kimenet.

### ir

readonly [`Token`](../../../core/src/interfaces/Token.md)[]

A forrás token IR.

## Visszatérési érték

`string`[]

Az ismeretlen token nevek.

## Példa

```ts
import { unknownReferences } from "@pantoken/utils";
import type { Token } from "@pantoken/model";

const ir: Token[] = [
  { name: "--instui-leaf", syntax: "<color>", inherits: true, value: "#0374B5" },
];

unknownReferences("--x: var(--instui-leaf); --y: var(--instui-gone);", ir);
// → ["--instui-gone"]
unknownReferences("--x: var(--instui-leaf);", ir); // → []  (no drift)
```

# Függvény: addScope()

> **addScope**(`options?`): [`Plugin`](https://postcss.org/api/#plugin)

Létrehozza a `@scope` becsomagoló bővítményt.

## Paraméterek

### options?

[`AddScopeOptions`](../interfaces/AddScopeOptions.md) = `{}`

## Visszatérési érték

[`Plugin`](https://postcss.org/api/#plugin)

## Példa

```ts
import postcss from "postcss";
import { addScope } from "@pantoken/pendo";

```
entries.02f310c2d79ec78e4ed25185fe633b6be9a8b7e5:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [platforms/swift/src](../index.md) / toSwift

# Függvény: toSwift()

> **toSwift**(`tokens`, `options`): `Promise`\<`string`\>

Swift kód kibocsátása explicit token IR-hez.

## Paraméterek

### tokens

readonly [`Token`](../../../../packages/core/src/interfaces/Token.md)[]

### options

[`GenerateSwiftOptions`](../interfaces/GenerateSwiftOptions.md)

## Visszatérési érték

`Promise`\<`string`\>

A kiírt Swift fájl elérési útja.

## Példák

**Egy adott téma IR-jének kibocsátása**

```ts
import { toSwift } from "@pantoken/swift";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const file = await toSwift(byTheme("canvas"), { outDir: "./Sources/Tokens" });
// writes Tokens.swift (class PanTokens { … })
```

**Sötét mód egyéni osztálynévvel és eszközkatalógussal**

```ts
import { toSwift } from "@pantoken/swift";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";

await toSwift(byTheme("rebrand"), {
  outDir: "./Sources/Tokens",
  mode: "dark",
  className: "InstUITokens",
  icons: ["add", "check"], // also emits Icons.xcassets
});
```

entries.05c1daacb186399768f801a26062f69a90d73c7a:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [design/swatches/src](../index.md) / toSwatches

# Függvény: toSwatches()

> **toSwatches**(`tokens`, `mode?`): [`Swatch`](../interfaces/Swatch.md)[]

Egy token IR-t lapos színminta-listává redukál: feloldja a hivatkozásokat, kiválaszt egy módot, és csak azokat a tokeneket tartja meg, amelyek értéke hex szín (az ikonok és a nem szín típusú tokenek eldobásra kerülnek).

## Paraméterek

### tokens

readonly [`Token`](../../../../packages/core/src/interfaces/Token.md)[]

Az IR (pl. `@pantoken/tokens` eredménye).

### mode?

[`Mode`](../type-aliases/Mode.md) = `"light"`

Melyik színmódot oldja fel (alapértelmezés: `"light"`).

## Visszatérési érték

[`Swatch`](../interfaces/Swatch.md)[]

A színminta-lista, token szerint elnevezve (a `--instui-` előtag nélkül).

## Példák

**A token IR redukálása világos módú színmintákká**

```ts
import { toSwatches } from "@pantoken/swatches";
import { tokens } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const swatches = toSwatches(tokens); // [{ name: "color-background-brand", hex: "#…" }, …]
```

**Sötét mód**

```ts
import { toSwatches } from "@pantoken/swatches";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const swatches = toSwatches(byTheme("canvas"), "dark");
```

[pantoken](../../../index.md) / svelte

# svelte

`@pantoken/svelte` — Svelte helpers over `@pantoken/web-components`.

`icon` is a Svelte action that renders an Instructure glyph into an element. `readToken` reads a
resolved `--instui-*` value (SSR-safe). The custom elements also work directly once `register()`
has run.

## Interfészek

- [ActionResult](interfaces/ActionResult.md)

## Függvények

- [readToken](functions/readToken.md)
- [icon](functions/icon.md)

## Hivatkozások

### register

Re-exports [register](../../angular/src/functions/register.md)

# CSS: breadcrumb `.instui-breadcrumb` — A breadcrumb trail with `/` separators; the last crumb is the current page. **Forrás:** [breadcrumb.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/breadcrumb.css) ## Accessibility Wrap the trail in `
` and mark the current page's crumb with `aria-current="page"`. ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/breadcrumb.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
Home Guides Components Breadcrumb
``` ## Structure ```text .instui-breadcrumb .item a icon (component) ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-breadcrumb"]:::cssdoc-root n1(".item"):::cssdoc-part n2("a"):::cssdoc-part n3(["icon"]):::cssdoc-component n2 --> n3 n1 --> n2 n0 --> n1 click n3 "/api/css/icon.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-size-large` | Large. Long-form alias of `-size-lg`. | | `.-size-lg` | Large. | | `.-size-sm` | Small. | | `.-size-small` | Small. Long-form alias of `-size-sm`. | ## Parts | Part | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.item` | A crumb; the last one is the current page. | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::after` | Renders the `/` separator after every crumb except the last. | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-color-text-muted` | `` | `light-dark(#576773, #AAB0B5)` | | `--instui-component-breadcrumb-gap-lg` | `` | `0.5rem` | | `--instui-component-breadcrumb-gap-md` | `` | `0.25rem` | | `--instui-component-breadcrumb-gap-sm` | `` | `0.125rem` | | `--instui-component-link-font-family` | `[ \| ]#` | `Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif` | | `--instui-component-link-font-size-lg` | `` | `1.75rem` | | `--instui-component-link-font-size-md` | `` | `1rem` | | `--instui-component-link-font-size-sm` | `` | `0.875rem` | | `--instui-component-link-text-color` | `` | `light-dark(#2369A4, #7FB4F1)` | | `--instui-component-link-text-hover-color` | `` | `light-dark(#1A5281, #ACCDF7)` | ## Browser support - Contains its element styles with the CSS `@scope` at-rule; needs a recent Chromium, Firefox, or Safari. ## Subcomponents - [icon](/api/css/icon.md) ## Related - [link](/api/css/link.md) — Styles each crumb as a link.
entries.097cc425de2b9f9dc8c70c9048eefdb26159f78b:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / tooltip

# Változó: tooltip

> `const` **tooltip**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-tooltip>` — wraps a slotted trigger and shows a `.tip` bubble (from the `tip` attribute)
on hover/focus. `placement` maps to `-placement-<value>` (e.g. `bottom`, `end`); `show-delay` and
`hide-delay` (ms, default 0) gate the reveal/hide, and Escape dismisses it. JS owns the timing:
a `.-show`-gated `!important` override neutralizes the pure-CSS `:hover`/`:focus-within` auto-show
so the delay actually applies.

## Példa

```html
<instui-tooltip tip="Placement bottom" placement="bottom" show-delay="200">
  <button class="instui-button -color-secondary">Hover me</button>
</instui-tooltip>
```

Long-form alias of `-size-lg`. | | `.-size-lg` | Large. | | `.-size-sm` | Small. | | `.-size-small` | Small. # css

`@pantoken/css` — emit Instructure design tokens as `@property`-typed CSS.

[toCss](functions/toCss.md) turns any token IR into CSS; [css](variables/css.md) is the ready-made `rebrand` stylesheet.
A DOM side-effect entry lives at `@pantoken/css/inject`, and a static file at
`@pantoken/css/style.css`.

[pantoken](../../../index.md) / mintlify

# mintlify

`@pantoken/mintlify` — theme a Mintlify docs site with Instructure tokens.

[toMintlifyConfig](functions/toMintlifyConfig.md) maps any IR onto the `colors` + `background` keys of a Mintlify
`docs.json`; [docsJson](variables/docsJson.md) is the ready-made `rebrand` fragment. Merge it into your `docs.json`.

## Példa

```jsonc
// docs.json
{
  "name": "My docs",
  "theme": "mint",
  "colors": { "primary": "#1D354F", "light": "#EEF4FD", "dark": "#1D354F" },
  "background": { "color": { "light": "#F2F4F5", "dark": "#10141A" } }
}
```

## Interfészek

- [MintlifyColors](interfaces/MintlifyColors.md)
- [MintlifyBackground](interfaces/MintlifyBackground.md)
- [MintlifyTheme](interfaces/MintlifyTheme.md)

## Függvények

- [toMintlifyConfig](functions/toMintlifyConfig.md)

## Hivatkozások

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / logos

# logos

`@pantoken/plugin-logos` — Instructure product logos as SVGs, data URIs, and image tokens.

It vendors the SVG logos from Instructure's UX guidelines for Canvas, Mastery, Parchment,
Instructure, LearnPlatform, and Ignite AI, in the standard layouts (horizontal, stacked, icon)
and color modes (full-color, color, dark, reversed, and so on). Each logo is available three ways:
the raw SVG ([getLogoSvg](functions/getLogoSvg.md)), a data URI ([getLogoDataUri](functions/getLogoDataUri.md)), and a
`--instui-logo-<product>-<layout>-<mode>` image token in `@pantoken/plugin-logos/logos.css`.

As a pantoken plugin, the `css` hook contributes those image tokens.

## Interfészek

- [LogoMeta](interfaces/LogoMeta.md)
- [LogosOptions](interfaces/LogosOptions.md)

## Típusaliasok

- [LogoColorMode](type-aliases/LogoColorMode.md)

## Változók

- [products](variables/products.md)
- [logosCss](variables/logosCss.md)

## Függvények

- [getLogoSvg](functions/getLogoSvg.md)
- [getLogoDataUri](functions/getLogoDataUri.md)
- [logosPlugin](functions/logosPlugin.md)

# plugin-kit

`@pantoken/plugin-kit` — build and compose pantoken plugins, with capability-aware registration.

[definePlugin](functions/definePlugin.md) is the modern factory: pass the hooks you implement and it returns a normal
`PantokenPlugin` branded with the capabilities inferred from those hooks. Consumers
(`buildTokens`, `toCss`) run [checkPlugins](functions/checkPlugins.md) to warn — never error — when a plugin is
registered where it has no effect: a non-factoried plugin (capability checks unavailable) or a
factoried plugin at a stage it doesn't implement (e.g. a token-only plugin passed to `toCss`).

The transform stages a `plugins:` array actually drives are `tokens`, `icons`, and `css`; `rehype`
(a render-time icon resolver) and `native` (Style Dictionary) are recorded as capabilities but are
downstream consumers, not guarded here.

## Példa

```ts
const brand = definePlugin({ name: "brand", tokens: (c) => [...c.tokens], css: () => ({ ... }) });
// capabilitiesOf(brand) → ["tokens", "css"]
```

## Interfészek

- [ResolveOptions](interfaces/ResolveOptions.md)

## Típusaliasok

- [Stage](type-aliases/Stage.md)

## Függvények

- [definePlugin](functions/definePlugin.md)
- [isFactoried](functions/isFactoried.md)
- [capabilitiesOf](functions/capabilitiesOf.md)
- [checkPlugins](functions/checkPlugins.md)
- [extendPlugin](functions/extendPlugin.md)
- [mergePlugin](functions/mergePlugin.md)
- [makeResolver](functions/makeResolver.md)
- [resolveTokens](functions/resolveTokens.md)

## Hivatkozások

### Mode

[pantoken](../../../index.md) / hugo

# hugo

`@pantoken/hugo` — emit the Instructure token stylesheet for a Hugo site.

Hugo has no standard theming-variable contract, so this delivers the tokens as drop-in assets
under `assets/` (where Hugo Pipes / Dart Sass pick them up): a Sass partial and a plain CSS file
(from `@pantoken/scss` and `@pantoken/css`), plus an InstUI-look prose stylesheet (from
`@pantoken/components`) that styles content in a `.pantoken-prose` region.

## Interfészek

- [HugoFile](interfaces/HugoFile.md)

## Függvények

- [toHugoAssets](functions/toHugoAssets.md)

# tailwind

`@pantoken/tailwind` — a Tailwind CSS preset that maps Instructure design tokens into the theme.

Every token is exposed as a `var(--instui-*)` reference (not a concrete value), so Tailwind
utilities like `bg-color-background-base` theme through the same CSS custom properties that
`@pantoken/css` emits — light/dark and high-contrast all keep working.

## Interfészek

# Interfész: PantokenPlugin

Egy pantoken plugin. Minden hook opcionális; egy plugin csak azokban a szakaszokban vesz részt, amelyekhez
hookot definiál. Ezért ugyanaz a plugin több rétegben is beavatkozhat.

## Tulajdonságok

### name

> **name**: `string`

Egyedi, ember által olvasható plugin név.

## Metódusok

### tokens()?

> `optional` **tokens**(`ctx`): `void` \| [`Token`](Token.md)[]

Token szakasz: adja vissza a teljes helyettesítő token listát (használja a `ctx.define` értéket hozzáadáshoz).

#### Paraméterek

##### ctx

[`TokenHookContext`](TokenHookContext.md)

#### Visszatérési érték

`void` \| [`Token`](Token.md)[]

***

### icons()?

> `optional` **icons**(`ctx`): `void`

Ikon szakasz: regisztráljon szolgáltatókat a `ctx.add` segítségével, vagy csomagolja be a `ctx.resolve` elemet.

#### Paraméterek

##### ctx

[`IconHookContext`](IconHookContext.md)

#### Visszatérési érték

`void`

***

### css()?

> `optional` **css**(`ctx`): `void` \| [`CssContribution`](CssContribution.md)

CSS szakasz: járuljon hozzá a CSS-hez, vagy dolgozza fel utólag.

#### Paraméterek

##### ctx

[`CssHookContext`](CssHookContext.md)

#### Visszatérési érték

`void` \| [`CssContribution`](CssContribution.md)

***

### rehype()?

> `optional` **rehype**(`ctx`): `void` \| \{ `resolve?`: [`IconResolver`](../type-aliases/IconResolver.md); \}

Rehype szakasz: biztosítson egy resolvert, amelyet a rehype pluginba egyesítenek.

#### Paraméterek

##### ctx

[`RehypeHookContext`](RehypeHookContext.md)

#### Visszatérési érték

`void` \| \{ `resolve?`: [`IconResolver`](../type-aliases/IconResolver.md); \}

***

### native()?

> `optional` **native**(`ctx`): `void`

Natív szakasz (Style Dictionary): regisztráljon transzformációkat/formátumokat.

#### Paraméterek

##### ctx

`unknown`

#### Visszatérési érték

`void`

# icon-font

`@pantoken/icon-font` — build an installable Instructure icon font (WOFF2 + TTF) with a matching
stylesheet and codepoint map. Unlike the inline-SVG paths, a font installs on a device, so it
works in design apps and offline contexts where the web tooling isn't reachable.

Stroke-based glyphs (Lucide) are outlined to fills so they render as real font glyphs; fill-based
glyphs (Instructure custom) pass through.

## Interfészek

- [IconFontResult](interfaces/IconFontResult.md)
- [BuildIconFontOptions](interfaces/BuildIconFontOptions.md)
- [GlyphPath](interfaces/GlyphPath.md)

- [svgToGlyphPath](functions/svgToGlyphPath.md)

# CSS: context-view `.instui-context-view` — An elevated callout with a caret, positionable on any side; works as a native `[popover]`. **Forrás:** [context-view.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/context-view.css) ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/context-view.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
A context view frames a callout with a caret. As a popover it rides the top layer and closes when you click away or press Esc.
``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-color-inverse` | Dark (inverse) colour scheme. | | `.-placement-bottom` | Sit below the anchor. | | `.-placement-end` | Sit at the end (inline-end) of the anchor. | | `.-placement-start` | Sit at the start (inline-start) of the anchor. | | `.-placement-top` | Sit above the anchor. | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::after` | Renders the caret's inner fill triangle. | | `::before` | Renders the caret's outer border triangle. | ## States | State | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `:state(open)` | — | ## Conditions | Type | Query | Leírás | | --- | --- | --- | | supports | `(position-area: block-end)` | — | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-color-background-elevated-surface-base` | `` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #171B21)` | | `--instui-color-background-inverse` | `` | `light-dark(#334450, #F2F4F5)` | | `--instui-color-text-base` | `` | `light-dark(#273540, #F2F4F5)` | | `--instui-color-text-inverse` | `` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #1C222B)` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-background-color` | `` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #171B21)` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-background-color-inverse` | `` | `light-dark(#334450, #F2F4F5)` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-border-color` | `` | `light-dark(#E8EAEC, #2D3D49)` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-border-color-inverse` | `` | `#00000000` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-border-width` | `` | `0.0625rem` | | `--instui-component-context-view-arrow-size` | `` | `0.5rem` | | `--instui-component-context-view-border-radius` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-elevation-above` | `[ inset? && {2,4} && ? ]# \| none` | `0 0.1875rem 0.375rem light-dark(rgba(35,68,101,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), 0 0.1875rem 0.375rem light-dark(rgba(35,68,101,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.3))` | | `--instui-spacing-space-lg` | `` | `1rem` | | `--instui-spacing-space-md` | `` | `0.75rem` | ## Browser support - Uses CSS anchor positioning (`position-anchor`, `position-area`, `position-try-fallbacks`) and the native `[popover]` API behind an `@supports` guard; needs a recent Chromium or Safari, and falls back to a UA-centred popover elsewhere. ## Related - [popover](/api/css/popover.md) — The generic top-layer popover. - [tooltip](/api/css/tooltip.md) — A smaller hover or focus callout.

[pantoken](../../../../../index.md) / [plugins/pantoken/logos/src](../index.md) / getLogoSvg

# Függvény: getLogoSvg()

> **getLogoSvg**(`product`, `layout?`, `colorMode?`): `string` \| `undefined`

Egy logó nyers SVG-jének lekérése.

## Paraméterek

### product

[`Product`](../type-aliases/Product.md)

A termék.

### layout?

[`LogoLayout`](../type-aliases/LogoLayout.md) = `"horizontal"`

Az elrendezés (alapértelmezett: `"horizontal"`).

### colorMode?

[`LogoColorMode`](../type-aliases/LogoColorMode.md) = `"full-color"`

A színkezelés (alapértelmezett: `"full-color"`).

## Visszatérési érték

`string` \| `undefined`

Az SVG-karakterlánc, vagy `undefined`, ha az adott kombináció nem létezik.

## Példák

**A Canvas alapértelmezett vízszintes, teljes színes logójának lekérése**

```ts
import { getLogoSvg } from "@pantoken/plugin-logos";

const svg = getLogoSvg("canvas");
```

**Adott elrendezés és színkezelés kiválasztása**

```ts
import { getLogoSvg } from "@pantoken/plugin-logos";

const reversed = getLogoSvg("instructure", "stacked", "reversed");
```

# Függvény: installAgentAssets()

> **installAgentAssets**(`tool`, `dir?`): `string`[]

A pantoken egy eszközhöz tartozó ügynökeszközeinek kiírása egy fogyasztói adattárba.

## Paraméterek

### tool

[`AgentTool`](../type-aliases/AgentTool.md) \| `"all"`

`string` = `"."`

import { installAgentAssets } from "@pantoken/ai";

```ts
import { installAgentAssets } from "@pantoken/ai";

installAgentAssets("all");
// writes AGENTS.md, llms.txt, and the Cursor/Copilot/Windsurf/Claude assets
```

entries.1526148a7465397ae462f89e45b2e1511ca81e76:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/core/src](../index.md) / collectIcons

# Függvény: collectIcons()

> **collectIcons**(`options?`): [`IconLayer`](../interfaces/IconLayer.md)

Az egységes InstUI ikonréteg összegyűjtése. Az egyéni glyphek elsőbbséget élveznek az azonos nevű Lucide
glyphekkel szemben. A kimenet név szerint van rendezve a determinisztikus eredmények érdekében.

## Paraméterek

### options?

[`CollectIconsOptions`](../interfaces/CollectIconsOptions.md) = `{}`

## Visszatérési érték

[`IconLayer`](../interfaces/IconLayer.md)

## Példák

**Minden glyph összegyűjtése az ikonszín speciális értékeivel együtt**

```ts
import { collectIcons } from "@pantoken/core";

const { glyphs, colors } = collectIcons();
// glyphs → IconToken[] (Custom + Lucide, name-sorted)
// colors → [["--instui-icon-color-ai", "…"], ["--instui-icon-color-inherit", "currentColor"]]
```

**Korlátozás csak az Instructure által készített glyphekre**

```ts
import { collectIcons } from "@pantoken/core";

const { glyphs } = collectIcons({ includeLucide: false });
// → only the Custom (Instructure-authored) glyphs
```
entries.15df468c677450e1259bdaead303d287a5518b21:
[pantoken](../../../index.md) / css-in-js

# css-in-js

`@pantoken/css-in-js` — an Instructure theme object for runtime CSS-in-JS libraries.

Works with any library that reads a theme from `props.theme` — Emotion, styled-components, and
Stitches all share that convention. [pantokenTheme](variables/pantokenTheme.md) is the ready-made `rebrand` object,
var()-backed so light/dark switching flows through `@pantoken/css`. [toStyledTheme](functions/toStyledTheme.md) builds
one from any IR (and can bake concrete values with `{ resolve }`).

## Példa

**styled-components**

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "styled-components";
import { pantokenTheme } from "@pantoken/css-in-js";
<ThemeProvider theme={pantokenTheme}>...</ThemeProvider>;
// const Btn = styled.button`background: ${({ theme }) => theme.colorBackgroundBrand};`;
```

## Interfészek

- [ToStyledThemeOptions](interfaces/ToStyledThemeOptions.md)

## Típusaliasok

- [StyledTheme](type-aliases/StyledTheme.md)

## Változók

- [pantokenTheme](variables/pantokenTheme.md)

## Függvények

- [toThemeKey](functions/toThemeKey.md)
- [toStyledTheme](functions/toStyledTheme.md)

## Hivatkozások

### Mode

Re-exports [Mode](../../../packages/core/src/type-aliases/Mode.md)

***

### default

Renames and re-exports [pantokenTheme](variables/pantokenTheme.md)

because it's a plain closure (no receiver): callers bind it as `export const buttonCss = button.css`,
so the annotation tells the linter the free-floating reference is safe.

## Paraméterek

### this

`void`

### options?

[`ComponentOptions`](../interfaces/ComponentOptions.md)

## Visszatérés

`string`

Nem-érték metaadatok.

# shadcn

`@pantoken/shadcn` — theme shadcn/ui with Instructure tokens.

[toShadcnCss](functions/toShadcnCss.md) emits a `:root` block pointing shadcn's CSS variables at `var(--instui-*)`.
Drop it in alongside `@pantoken/css` (which defines the custom properties) and shadcn components
adopt the Instructure look. Icons align for free — shadcn and Instructure both use Lucide.

entries.24770849b0463754e03831eaf9ca2eee54802b5e:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / RegisterContext

# Interfész: RegisterContext

The shared state a `register()` call builds once and threads to every [ElementDefinition](ElementDefinition.md).
It carries the prefix-aware registry adapter, the `tag()` helper for nested markup, the CSS-class
prefix `I`, the Invoker Commands support flag + router, and the `wrapper`/`variantClass`/`iconSvg`
factories the simple elements share.

## Tulajdonságok

### registry

> **registry**: [`ElementRegistry`](ElementRegistry.md)

The scoped registry: rewrites `instui-<base>` → the active-prefix tag on `get`/`define`.

***

### tag

> **tag**: (`base`) => `string`

Map a base name to the active-prefix tag (for nested markup, `querySelector`, `tagName`).

#### Paraméterek

##### base

`string`

#### Visszatérés

`string`

***

### I

> **I**: `object`

The CSS-class prefix for the inlined component sheets — always `instui`, separate from the tag prefix.

#### prefix

> `readonly` **prefix**: `"instui"`

***

### invokerSupported

> **invokerSupported**: `boolean`

Whether the browser supports the Invoker Commands API (`command`/`commandfor`).

***

### onCommand

> **onCommand**: (`target`, `handler`) => `void`

Route a target's `command` events (or a click fallback) to a handler.

#### Paraméterek

##### target

`HTMLElement`

##### handler

(`command`, `source`) => `void`

#### Visszatérés

`void`

***

### wrapper

> **wrapper**: (`tag`, `css`, `render`, `options?`) => `void`

Define a shadow-DOM element: `<style>:host{display}css</style>` + markup from `render(host)`.
`invoker: true` forwards the host's `popovertarget`/`command` to the inner `<button>` (IDL).

#### Paraméterek

##### tag

`string`

##### css

`string`

##### render

(`host`) => `string`

##### options?

###### display?

`string`

###### invoker?

`boolean`

#### Visszatérés

`void`

***

### variantClass

> **variantClass**: (`name`, `host`) => `string`

Build a `.instui-<name>` class with an optional `-color-<variant>` modifier from `variant`.

#### Paraméterek

##### name

`string`

##### host

`HTMLElement`

#### Visszatérés

`string`

***

### iconSvg

> **iconSvg**: (`name`) => `string`

Resolve an icon name to inline SVG (empty string when unknown).

#### Paraméterek

##### name

`string`

#### Visszatérés

`string`

entries.2998a1367576f9be2e52c865217467f754f13cfe: # CSS: tooltip `.instui-tooltip` — A CSS hover and focus tooltip bubble, positionable on any side. **Forrás:** [tooltip.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/tooltip.css) ## Accessibility Point the trigger at the bubble with aria-describedby and give the bubble role="tooltip". ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/tooltip.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html Default placement is top ``` ## Structure ```text .instui-tooltip icon (component) .tip ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-tooltip"]:::cssdoc-root n1(["icon"]):::cssdoc-component n2(".tip"):::cssdoc-part n0 --> n1 n0 --> n2 click n1 "/api/css/icon.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Parts | Part | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.tip` | The bubble; `-placement-*` sets its side. | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-border-radius-sm` | `` | `0.25rem` | | `--instui-color-background-inverse` | `` | `light-dark(#334450, #F2F4F5)` | | `--instui-color-text-inverse` | `` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #1C222B)` | | `--instui-component-tooltip-font-family` | `[ \| ]#` | `Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif` | | `--instui-component-tooltip-font-size` | `` | `0.875rem` | | `--instui-component-tooltip-font-weight` | `` | `400` | | `--instui-component-tooltip-padding` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-spacing-space-xs` | `` | `0.25rem` | ## Subcomponents - [icon](/api/css/icon.md) ## Related - [popover](/api/css/popover.md) — The larger, click-triggered anchored surface. - [context-view](/api/css/context-view.md) — A related anchored surface with a pointer.

entries.2b5d85dad96d57427694b6f13f26697ba0b6b83f:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / transition # transition `@pantoken/plugin-transition` — the CSS behind InstUI's `Transition` utility. InstUI's `Transition` drives enter/exit animations by toggling per-state class names (`…-entering`, `…-entered`, `…-exiting`, `…-exited`) on an element as it mounts and unmounts. This plugin emits those rules — a base `.instui-transition` (the animated `transition` property) plus the `fade`, `scale`, and `slide-{up,down,left,right}` type/state classes — and defines the `--instui-transition-duration` / `--instui-transition-timing` tokens they read. Toggle the state class from your own JS (or a framework's transition group); the CSS does the animation. ## Példa ```ts import { toCss } from "@pantoken/css"; import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens"; import { transition } from "@pantoken/plugin-transition"; const css = toCss(byTheme("rebrand"), { plugins: [transition()] }); //
…
``` ## Interfészek - [TransitionOptions](interfaces/TransitionOptions.md) ## Függvények - [transition](functions/transition.md) ## Hivatkozások ### default Renames and re-exports [transition](functions/transition.md)

# Függvény: pruneCustomProps()

> **pruneCustomProps**(): [`Plugin`](https://postcss.org/api/#plugin)

Létrehozza a prune-unused-custom-properties PostCSS beépülő modult.

## Visszatérési érték

[`Plugin`](https://postcss.org/api/#plugin)

Egy PostCSS [Plugin](https://postcss.org/api/#plugin).

## Példa

**Futtatás önálló PostCSS lépésként**

```ts
import postcss from "postcss";
import { pruneCustomProps } from "@pantoken/plugin-prune-custom-props";

// only the --instui-* custom properties reachable from real declarations survive
```

# postcss

`@pantoken/postcss` — a PostCSS plugin that expands an `@pantoken;` at-rule into the full
Instructure token stylesheet (`@property` registrations + declarations). Write `@pantoken;` where
you want the tokens defined, and the plugin replaces it at build time.

## Interfészek

- [PantokenPostcssOptions](interfaces/PantokenPostcssOptions.md)

## Függvények

- [pantoken](functions/pantoken.md)

## Hivatkozások

### default

Renames and re-exports [pantoken](functions/pantoken.md)

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [platforms/vanilla/src](../index.md) / toVanillaVariables

# Függvény: toVanillaVariables()

> **toVanillaVariables**(`tokens`, `options?`): `Record`\<`string`, `unknown`\>

IR token lista konvertálása Vanilla Foundation `variables.json` objektummá.

## Paraméterek

### tokens

readonly [`Token`](../../../../packages/core/src/interfaces/Token.md)[]

Az IR (pl. `@pantoken/tokens` eredménye).

### options?

[`ToVanillaOptions`](../interfaces/ToVanillaOptions.md) = `{}`

[ToVanillaOptions](../interfaces/ToVanillaOptions.md).

## Visszatérési érték

`Record`\<`string`, `unknown`\>

A beágyazott változók objektum, amelyet a téma `variables.json` eszközére kell PUT-olni.

## Példák

**IR konvertálása beágyazott változók objektummá**

```ts
import { toVanillaVariables } from "@pantoken/vanilla";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const vars = toVanillaVariables(byTheme("rebrand"));
// { global: { mainColors: { primary: "#…" }, … }, titleBar: { … }, button: { … } }
```

**Sötét mód**

```ts
import { toVanillaVariables } from "@pantoken/vanilla";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const vars = toVanillaVariables(byTheme("canvas"), { mode: "dark" });
```

# CSS: alert `.instui-alert` — An inline message with a status colour bar and a masked status glyph from the shared icon set. A custom `-icon-` swaps the status glyph but keeps the variant's coloured bar; the bar fill is re-asserted at higher specificity so the shared icon painter doesn't consume it. **Forrás:** [alert.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/alert.css) ## Accessibility For an important message, add `role="alert"` or an `aria-live` region so assistive tech announces it; the dismiss control is a labelled close button (the `.instui-close-button` in the example carries `aria-label="Close"`). ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/alert.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
An alert with the default info color, and a custom icon.
Congratulations! You're using the "success" color.
``` ## Structure ```text .instui-alert ‹content› close-button (component, 0..1) ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-alert"]:::cssdoc-root n1[/"‹content›"/]:::cssdoc-slot n2(["close-button"]):::cssdoc-component n0 --> n1 n0 -.->|0..1| n2 click n2 "/api/css/close-button.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Slots | Slot | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `content` | The alert's message content; may include a dismiss button. | ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-color-danger` | An error message. | | `.-color-info` | Informational (default). | | `.-color-success` | A positive/confirmation message. | | `.-color-warning` | A cautionary message. | | `.-has-shadow-false` | Elavult — use `.-without-shadow`. | | `.-icon-*` | Swap the status glyph for a custom icon (e.g. `-icon-megaphone`), kept white on the variant's coloured bar. | | `.-render-custom-icon-*` | Elavult — The former `renderCustomIcon` prop; still works as an alias, but use `-icon-` (or override `--pantoken-alert-glyph`) instead. | | `.-screen-reader-only` | Visually hidden but announced. | | `.-variant-error` | Elavult — use `.-color-danger`. | | `.-variant-info` | Elavult — use `.-color-info`. | | `.-variant-success` | Elavult — use `.-color-success`. | | `.-variant-warning` | Elavult — use `.-color-warning`. | | `.-without-shadow` | Remove the default elevation shadow (InstUI `hasShadow={false}`). | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::after` | The white status glyph, masked and centred over the bar. | | `::before` | The solid variant-coloured status bar, flush to the rounded start edge. | ## Custom properties | Tulajdonság | Type | Default | Leírás | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `--pantoken-alert-glyph` | `` | — | The low-level status-glyph source; [pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/core/src](../index.md) / dedupeByName

# Függvény: dedupeByName()

> **dedupeByName**(`tokens`): [`Token`](../interfaces/Token.md)[]

Tokenek deduplikálása név alapján, megtartva az utolsó előfordulást (így a későbbi bővítmények nyernek).

## Paraméterek

### tokens

[`Token`](../interfaces/Token.md)[]

## Visszatérési érték

[`Token`](../interfaces/Token.md)[]

## Példa

```ts
import { dedupeByName } from "@pantoken/core";
import type { Token } from "@pantoken/model";

const tokens: Token[] = [
  { name: "--instui-x", syntax: "<color>", inherits: true, value: "#fff" },
  { name: "--instui-x", syntax: "<color>", inherits: true, value: "#000" },
];
dedupeByName(tokens); // → one token, value "#000" (the later wins)
```
entries.34ed8ebc4db80972eb67886bcb2e34523b12767c:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / dateInput

# Változó: dateInput

> `const` **dateInput**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-date-input>` — a text field plus a calendar dropdown. The trigger toggles a `[popover]`
through the built-in `toggle-popover` Invoker Command (a click fallback covers browsers without the
API); picking a day in the nested `<instui-calendar>` fills the field (ISO `yyyy-mm-dd`), closes the
popover, and emits a composed, bubbling `change` (`detail.value`). Typing a valid `yyyy-mm-dd` (or
clearing it) and committing on the input's `change` works too. `value` is the ISO date, `label` the
accessible name (default `Date`), and `placeholder` the hint (default `yyyy-mm-dd`).

## Példa

```html
<instui-date-input value="2026-07-08" label="Due date"></instui-date-input>
```

entries.35ba56f4b13d69df7d142707408a693412affeac:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / calendar

# Változó: calendar

> `const` **calendar**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-calendar>` — an interactive month grid. `value` (`yyyy-mm-dd`) is the selected day and
`view` (`yyyy-mm-dd`, optional) the visible month. The prev/next chevrons and every day are
`<button>`s driving the Invoker Commands API (`--calendar-prev`, `--calendar-next`,
`--calendar-select`) at the grid; selecting a day updates `value`/`view` and dispatches a composed,
bubbling `change` event (`detail.value` is the ISO date). Renders its own grid (no slot), so it
works standalone or nested inside a date picker.

## Példa

```html
<instui-calendar value="2026-07-08"></instui-calendar>
```

Release notes

entries.361f9dc3463d301755be386364bc38f6da745a94:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/utils/src](../index.md) / resolveTokens

# Függvény: resolveTokens()

> **resolveTokens**(`base`, `options?`): `Map`\<`string`, `string`\>

Feloldja minden token értékét a halmazzal szemben (lásd [makeResolver](makeResolver.md)), név szerint kulcsolva.

## Paraméterek

### base

readonly [`Token`](../../../core/src/interfaces/Token.md)[]

### options?

[`ResolveOptions`](../interfaces/ResolveOptions.md) = `{}`

## Visszatérési érték

`Map`\<`string`, `string`\>

## Példa

**Egy teljes IR feloldása név → érték leképezésre**

```ts
import { resolveTokens } from "@pantoken/utils";
import type { Token } from "@pantoken/model";

const ir: Token[] = [
  { name: "--instui-leaf", syntax: "<color>", inherits: true, value: "#0374B5" },
  { name: "--instui-brand", syntax: "*", inherits: true, value: "var(--instui-leaf)" },
  { name: "--instui-bg", syntax: "*", inherits: true, value: "light-dark(#fff, #000)" },
];

const byName = resolveTokens(ir, { mode: "dark" });
byName.get("--instui-brand"); // → "#0374B5"
byName.get("--instui-bg");    // → "#000"
```

``` ## Structure ```text .instui-calendar .nav button (component) strong .grid .weekday .day ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-calendar"]:::cssdoc-root n1(".nav"):::cssdoc-part n2(["button"]):::cssdoc-component n3("strong"):::cssdoc-part n4(".grid"):::cssdoc-part n5(".weekday"):::cssdoc-part n6(".day"):::cssdoc-part n1 --> n2 n1 --> n3 n0 --> n1 n4 --> n5 n4 --> n6 n0 --> n4 click n2 "/api/css/button.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; [pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / ELEMENTS

# Változó: ELEMENTS

> `const` **ELEMENTS**: readonly \[`"icon"`, `"button"`, `"alert"`, `"badge"`, `"pill"`, `"tag"`, `"avatar"`, `"spinner"`, `"progress"`, `"metric"`, `"rating"`, `"progress-circle"`, `"icon-button"`, `"toggle-button"`, `"truncate"`, `"img"`, `"side-nav-bar"`, `"tree-browser"`, `"calendar"`, `"tooltip"`, `"modal"`, `"context-view"`, `"popover"`, `"tray"`, `"in-place-edit"`, `"drilldown"`, `"pages"`, `"drawer-layout"`, `"date-input"`, `"date-time-input"`\]

The base (unprefixed) element names this package registers. [register](../functions/register.md) mints a tag per name
under its `prefix` option — `icon` → `<instui-icon>` by default, or `<x-icon>` for `{ prefix: "x" }`.
A prefix is always applied (a custom-element name must contain a hyphen), so an empty or nullish prefix
falls back to the default `instui`.

entries.3be208eb4a223ac52c2dc1bbe6cb927eba4b5ab5:
[pantoken](../../../../../index.md) / [plugins/pantoken/colors/src](../index.md) / darken

# Függvény: darken()

> **darken**(`color`, `percent?`): `string`

Darken by `percent` HSL-lightness points — the CSS-only mirror of ui-color-utils `darken`
(tinycolor lowers HSL lightness). Uses relative color syntax so hue and saturation are preserved.

In relative `hsl()`, the `l` channel resolves to a `<number>` on the 0–100 scale — the same scale
tinycolor's `amount` uses — so the points are subtracted directly (no `%`).

## Paraméterek

### color

`string`

The base color.

### percent?

`number` = `10`

Lightness points to subtract (default `10`, matching tinycolor's default).

## Visszatérés

`string`

An `hsl(from …)` relative-color expression.

## Példa

```ts
darken("var(--brand)", 10); // "hsl(from var(--brand) h s calc(l - 10))"
```
entries.3ca0671cc7d6d90165d56bf177a857c7434ca733:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/core/src](../index.md) / applyModify

# Függvény: applyModify()

> **applyModify**(`value`, `modify`): `string` \| `undefined`

Tokens Studio [TokenModify](../interfaces/TokenModify.md) alkalmazása egy konkrét hexadecimális színre.

## Paraméterek

### value

`string`

### modify

[`TokenModify`](../interfaces/TokenModify.md)

## Visszatérési érték

`string` \| `undefined`

A módosított szín, vagy `undefined`, ha a `value` nem hexadecimális szín (így a hívó
  a módosítót metaadatként megőrizheti).

## Példák

**Sötétítés, világosítás és alfa hozzáadása**

```ts
import { applyModify } from "@pantoken/core";

applyModify("#808080", { type: "darken", value: 0.5 });  // → "#404040"
applyModify("#808080", { type: "lighten", value: 0.5 }); // → "#c0c0c0"
applyModify("#ffffff", { type: "alpha", value: 0.5 });   // → "#ffffff80"
```

**Nem hexadecimális bemenet és keverés undefined értéket ad vissza (metaadatként megőrzendő)**

```ts
import { applyModify } from "@pantoken/core";

applyModify("var(--x)", { type: "darken", value: 0.1 });        // → undefined
applyModify("#fff", { type: "mix", value: 0.5, color: "#000" }); // → undefined
```

entries.3cf383836efa4d98971f17470921d47885fff8ba:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / primitives

# primitives

Opt-in utility classes for the raw pantoken primitive palette (`--instui-primitive-*`).

The semantic utilities in `@pantoken/components` deliberately expose only semantic tokens — a color
override there is always a role (`bg-brand`), never a raw swatch. This package is the escape hatch:
one class per primitive token for the rare case a developer needs the palette directly. Load it on
its own (`@pantoken/plugin-primitives/primitives.css`), separate from the semantic layer.

## Példa

**Build the primitive stylesheet**

```ts
import { primitivesCss } from "@pantoken/plugin-primitives";
import { tokens } from "@pantoken/tokens";

const names = (p: string) => tokens.filter((t) => t.name.startsWith(p)).map((t) => t.name);
const css = primitivesCss({
  color: names("--instui-primitive-color-"),
  fontFamily: names("--instui-primitive-font-family-"),
  fontWeight: names("--instui-primitive-font-weight-"),
});
// .instui-bg-primitive-color-white { background: var(--instui-primitive-color-white); }
```

## Interfészek

- [PrimitiveTokenNames](interfaces/PrimitiveTokenNames.md)
- [PrimitivesOptions](interfaces/PrimitivesOptions.md)

## Függvények

- [primitivesCss](functions/primitivesCss.md)

## Hivatkozások

### default

Renames and re-exports [primitivesCss](functions/primitivesCss.md)

[pantoken](../../../index.md) / markdown-it

# markdown-it

`@pantoken/markdown-it` — a markdown-it plugin that renders `:icon:` codes as inline SVG and
standalone color values (`#03893D`, `rgb(…)`, `oklch(…)`) as swatches, using the pantoken icon
set.

It ports the `@pantoken/rehype` and `@pantoken/react-markdown` pipelines onto markdown-it: a
single core rule walks each inline token's text children, splits them on the icon and color
patterns, and swaps the matches for `html_inline` tokens. Icon codes resolve through a chain —
plugin `rehype` resolvers first, then an explicit [MarkdownItOptions.resolve](interfaces/MarkdownItOptions.md#resolve), then the
built-in `@pantoken/icons` set — so brand-icon plugins compose the same way they do elsewhere.

The emitted markup uses the same class names as the other renderers (`pantoken-icon`,
`pantoken-color-swatch`), so loading `@pantoken/components` styles it. Wrap the rendered HTML in a
`.pantoken-prose` container (see [PROSE\_CLASS](variables/PROSE_CLASS.md)) to pick up the prose layer too.

## Példa

```ts
import MarkdownIt from "markdown-it";
import { pantokenMarkdownIt } from "@pantoken/markdown-it";

const md = new MarkdownIt().use(pantokenMarkdownIt);
md.render("Save :check: to lock in #03893D.");
```

## Interfészek

- [MarkdownItOptions](interfaces/MarkdownItOptions.md)

## Változók

- [PROSE\_CLASS](variables/PROSE_CLASS.md)

## Függvények

- [pantokenMarkdownIt](functions/pantokenMarkdownIt.md)

## Hivatkozások

### default

Renames and re-exports [pantokenMarkdownIt](functions/pantokenMarkdownIt.md)

# rehype

`@pantoken/rehype` — render `:icon:` codes as inline SVG.

The plugin walks hast text nodes and replaces `:code:` tokens with an inline SVG element,
resolving each code through a chain: plugin `rehype` resolvers first, then any explicit
`resolve`, then the built-in `@pantoken/icons` set. It ports `rehype-instui-markdown` onto the
shared icon manifest.

entries.4163fae93ea0c2f71d98563f9430d315c6a251e5:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/core/src](../index.md) / cssSyntaxForValue

# Függvény: cssSyntaxForValue()

> **cssSyntaxForValue**(`value`): `string`

Kideríti azt a CSS `@property` `syntax`, amely alá egy konkrét tokent regisztrálni kell. A Tokens Studio
`type` nem feleltethetők meg 1:1 a CSS-szintaxisnak, ezért az értéket vizsgálja meg. A `"*"` (univerzális) értéket adja vissza
minden olyan esetben, ami nem egyetlen, számítási szempontból független, típusos token.

## Paraméterek

### value

`string`

Egy konkrét érték (nincs `var()` / `light-dark()`).

## Visszatérési érték

`string`

A `@property` szintaxisleíró.

## Példák

**Típusos, egyetlen tokenből álló értékek**

```ts
import { cssSyntaxForValue } from "@pantoken/core";

cssSyntaxForValue("#03893D"); // → "<color>"
cssSyntaxForValue("2px");     // → "<length>"
cssSyntaxForValue("50%");     // → "<percentage>"
cssSyntaxForValue("400");     // → "<integer>"
```

**A betűméret-függő egységek és az összetett értékek az univerzálisra esnek vissza**

```ts
import { cssSyntaxForValue } from "@pantoken/core";

cssSyntaxForValue("1rem");                     // → "*" (rem isn't computationally independent)
cssSyntaxForValue("Lato, Helvetica, sans-serif"); // → "*"
cssSyntaxForValue("currentColor");             // → "*"
```

entries.4354d71aa8cc8762b747bef8e4d777dbda22ea9a:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / pages

# Változó: pages

> `const` **pages**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-pages>` — shows one slotted `[data-page]` panel at a time, swapping with the View
Transitions API when available (a plain toggle otherwise). `push(id)`/`back()` keep a history
stack; the `active` attribute reflects the current page and can be set to navigate, and a bubbling
`change` event (`detail.page`) fires per swap. Drivable from light DOM via Invoker Commands:
`<button command="--push" commandfor="pages-id" data-page="…">` and
`<button command="--back" commandfor="pages-id">`.

## Példa

```html
<instui-pages active="one">
  <section data-page="one">First <button command="--push" commandfor="p" data-page="two">Next</button></section>
  <section data-page="two">Second <button command="--back" commandfor="p">Back</button></section>
</instui-pages>
```

# Függvény: componentsCss()

> **componentsCss**(`options?`): `string`

Build the aggregated component stylesheet: the `--instui-elevation-*` scale (so shadows are intrinsic)
followed by every component's rules in the `COMPONENTS` concat order. The size-alias and
deprecated-alias twins are appended PER COMPONENT (within its own chunk) so each alias documents on
its own page — the deprecated aliases are discovered from each record's `@deprecated {@link -x}`
metadata (see `withAliases`), not a central hand-kept list.

entries.485a2ec34dd9ea0c21cc893e7cf62482fc9651a5:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/plugin-kit/src](../index.md) / extendPlugin

# Függvény: extendPlugin()

> **extendPlugin**(`base`, `overrides`): [`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)

Bővítmény építése egy másik tetejére. Az azonos fázisú hookok kompozícióba kerülnek: `tokens` először `base` majd
`overrides` fut (amely az alap kimenetét látja); `css` mindkét `CssContribution` értéket egyesíti; `icons`/`native` mindkettő
fut; `rehype` láncolja a feloldókat (először a felülírások). A képességek unióként jelennek meg.

## Paraméterek

### base

[`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)

A bővítendő bővítmény.

### overrides

`Partial`\<[`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)\>

A tetejére rétegzett hookok (és egy opcionális `name`).

## Visszatérési érték

[`PantokenPlugin`](../../../core/src/interfaces/PantokenPlugin.md)

Egy új márkázott bővítmény.

## Példa

**További CSS-hozzájárulás hozzáadása egy alap bővítmény tetejére**

```ts
import { definePlugin, extendPlugin } from "@pantoken/plugin-kit";

const base = definePlugin({ name: "brand", css: () => ({ append: ":root {}" }) });
const themed = extendPlugin(base, { css: () => ({ append: ".dark {}" }) });
// themed.css merges both contributions; its append holds ":root {}\n\n.dark {}"
```

# CSS: tree-browser `.instui-tree-browser` — A disclosure tree of nested collections and leaf items, with rotating chevrons. Each collection is a native `
`; nesting them inside one another builds the tree, and the browser handles opening and closing every branch. **Forrás:** [tree-browser.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/tree-browser.css) ## Accessibility Mark the root with role="tree" and each nested list with role="group". ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/tree-browser.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
Course files
  • Syllabus.pdf
  • Week 1
    • Reading.pdf
    • Slides.pptx
  • Rubric.docx
``` ## Structure ```text .instui-tree-browser details summary icon (component) ul li .item icon (component) ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-tree-browser"]:::cssdoc-root n1("details"):::cssdoc-part n2("summary"):::cssdoc-part n3(["icon"]):::cssdoc-component n4("ul"):::cssdoc-part n5("li"):::cssdoc-part n6(".item"):::cssdoc-part n7(["icon"]):::cssdoc-component n2 --> n3 n1 --> n2 n6 --> n7 n5 --> n6 n4 --> n5 n1 --> n4 n0 --> n1 click n3 "/api/css/icon.md" click n7 "/api/css/icon.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-size-large` | Large. Long-form alias of `-size-lg`. | | `.-size-lg` | Large. | | `.-size-sm` | Small. | | `.-size-small` | Small. Long-form alias of `-size-sm`. | ## Parts | Part | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.item` | A leaf entry in the tree. | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::before` | Draws each collection's disclosure chevron, a masked glyph that rotates to point down when the branch is open. | ## States | State | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `:state(open)` | — | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-border-radius` | `` | `0.5rem` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-base-spacing-large` | `` | `1rem` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-base-spacing-medium` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-base-spacing-small` | `` | `0.5rem` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-name-font-size-small` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-name-text-color` | `` | `light-dark(#2369A4, #7FB4F1)` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-selected-background-color` | `` | `light-dark(#4A5B68, #576773)` | | `--instui-component-tree-browser-tree-button-selected-text-color` | `` | `#ffffff` | | entries.4cd6e653685b5b1efaa3d73bc0e6fd3b40027d90:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / icon

# Változó: icon

> `const` **icon**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-icon>` — an inline SVG glyph from the pantoken icon set. The `name` attribute picks the
glyph, `size` (any CSS length, default `1em`) sizes it, `color` (any CSS color) tints it, and
`margin` adds spacing around it (InstUI keywords like `small`). Renders the SVG into its own light
DOM, sized/coloured via inline styles on the host, so it inherits `currentColor` like text.

## Példa

```html
<instui-icon name="arrow-left" margin="small"></instui-icon>
<instui-icon name="star" size="1.5rem" color="gold" margin="small"></instui-icon>
```

entries.4eea3818e1721313ca8f338f1ffeae4ad31e31f5:
# CSS: checkbox

`.instui-checkbox` — A native checkbox and its label, or a switch via `-variant-toggle`.

Set `el.indeterminate = true` in JavaScript to show the mixed-state dash; the checked tick auto-contrasts against the fill — white on a dark fill, near-black on a light one.

**Forrás:** [checkbox.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/checkbox.css)

## Accessibility

A native `<input type="checkbox">` drives `:checked`, `:indeterminate`, and `:disabled`; set `el.indeterminate = true` in JavaScript for the mixed state, and note that `-readonly` is styling only since checkboxes have no native readonly attribute.

## Usage

```css
@import "@pantoken/components/components.css";
@import "@pantoken/components/checkbox.css";
```

## Példák

```html
<label class="instui-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" checked> Checked</label>
```

## Modifiers

| Modifier | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `.-invalid` | Invalid (error) state. |
| `.-label-placement-end` | Place the label after the control. |
| `.-label-placement-start` | Place the label before the control. |
| `.-label-placement-top` | Place the label above the control. |
| `.-readonly` | Read-only state. |
| `.-size-large` | Large. Long-form alias of `-size-lg`. |
| `.-size-lg` | Large. |
| `.-size-sm` | Small. |
| `.-size-small` | Small. Long-form alias of `-size-sm`. |
| `.-variant-toggle` | Render as a switch instead of a box. |

## Parts

| Part | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `.asterisk` | The required-field asterisk. |

## Pseudo-elements

| Pseudo-element | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `::after` | On `-variant-toggle`, the state glyph riding the handle: an X when off, a check when on. |
| `::before` | The masked tick or dash glyph centered in the box; on `-variant-toggle` it becomes the sliding handle instead. |

## States

| State | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `:checked` | — |
| `:disabled` | — |
| `:indeterminate` | — |

## Custom properties

| Tulajdonság | Type | Default | Leírás |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--pantoken-cb-glyph` | `<url>` | — | The box's mask glyph: a tick when checked, a dash when indeterminate. |
| `--pantoken-toggle-bw` | `<length>` | — | The toggle border width. |
| `--pantoken-toggle-h` | `<length>` | — | The toggle switch height. |
| `--pantoken-toggle-handle` | `<length>` | — | The computed handle diameter. |
| `--pantoken-toggle-inset` | `<length>` | — | The handle inset from each track edge. |
| `--pantoken-toggle-w` | `<length>` | — | The toggle track width. |

## Tokens consumed

| Token | Type | Value |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--instui-border-width-sm` | `<length>` | `0.0625rem` |
| `--instui-color-background-muted` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#F2F4F5, #273540)` |
| `--instui-color-stroke-base` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#8D959F, #6A7883)` |
| `--instui-color-text-muted` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#576773, #AAB0B5)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-asterisk-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#CF1F24, #FA917F)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-background-checked-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#273540, #ffffff)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-background-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #171B21)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-background-disabled-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#E8EAEC, #334450)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-background-hover-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #171B21)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-background-readonly-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#C7CACD, #6A7883)` |
| `--instui-component-checkbox-border-checked-color` | `<color>` | `light-dark(#273540, #ffffff)` |

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/cli/src](../index.md) / parseArgs

# Függvény: parseArgs()

> **parseArgs**(`argv`): [`CliArgs`](../interfaces/CliArgs.md)

`generate <target> [--out dir] [--theme t] [--class Name]` elemzése.

## Paraméterek

### argv

readonly `string`[]

## Visszatérési érték

[`CliArgs`](../interfaces/CliArgs.md)

## Példák

**Pozicionális cél és értékjelzők**

```ts
import { parseArgs } from "@pantoken/cli";

parseArgs(["generate", "swift", "--out", "./ios", "--theme", "canvas"]);
// → { command: "generate", target: "swift", out: "./ios", theme: "canvas",
//     className: "PanTokens", … }
```

**Logikai jelzők és vesszővel elválasztott --icons lista**

```ts
import { parseArgs } from "@pantoken/cli";

const args = parseArgs(["generate", "pendo", "--no-scope", "--icons", "arrow-left,check-mark"]);
args.noScope; // → true
args.icons;   // → ["arrow-left", "check-mark"]
```
entries.51d7e973c44da8a013ac8e39cfc0410ab043a736: # CSS: badge `.instui-badge` — A small count or status dot placed over a target's corner. To place a badge over a target, wrap both in a `.instui-badge-wrapper` (the position anchor) and pin the badge with a `-placement-*` modifier. **Forrás:** [badge.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/badge.css) ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/badge.css"; ``` ## Demo ```demo self:badge ``` ## Példák ```html 4 ``` ## Structure The badge renders inline on its own, or inside an optional `instui-badge-wrapper` that anchors it over a target. ```text .instui-badge-wrapper (0..1) ‹content› .instui-badge ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-badge-wrapper (0..1)"]:::cssdoc-root n1[/"‹content›"/]:::cssdoc-slot n2(".instui-badge"):::cssdoc-part n0 --> n1 n0 --> n2 classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-color-danger` | An attention/error count. | | `.-color-inverse` | On-dark: a light chip with dark text. | | `.-color-success` | A positive/complete count. | | `.-placement-bottom-end` | Position at the bottom-end corner. | | `.-placement-bottom-start` | Position at the bottom-start corner. | | `.-placement-end-center` | Position centred on the end edge. | | `.-placement-start-center` | Position centred on the start edge. | | `.-placement-top-end` | Position at the top-end corner. | | `.-placement-top-start` | Position at the top-start corner. | | `.-pulse` | A pulsing attention ring. | | `.-standalone` | Render inline, not positioned over a target's corner. | | `.-type-notification` | A dot only, no count. | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::before` | The pulsing attention ring drawn in the badge's accent colour (the `-pulse` variant). | ## Custom properties | Tulajdonság | Type | Default | Leírás | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `--pantoken-badge-accent` | `` | — | The chip fill; each `-color-*` variant and the pulse ring read from it. | | `--pantoken-badge-text` | `` | — | The text colour, paired to the accent so it stays legible. | ## Animations | Animation | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `pantoken-badge-pulse` | The pulse ring animation. | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-border-width-md` | `` | `0.125rem` | | `--instui-component-badge-border-radius` | `` | `999rem` | | `--instui-component-badge-color` | `` | `#ffffff` | | `--instui-component-badge-color-danger` | `` | `#E62429` | | `--instui-component-badge-color-inverse` | `` | `#273540` | | `--instui-component-badge-color-primary` | `` | `light-dark(#1D354F, #EEF4FD)` | | `--instui-component-badge-color-success` | `` | `#03893D` | | `--instui-component-badge-font-family` | `[ \| ]#` | `Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif` | | `--instui-component-badge-font-size` | `` | `0.875rem` | | `--instui-component-badge-font-weight` | `` | `600` | | `--instui-component-badge-padding` | `` | `0.25rem` | | `--instui-component-badge-size` | `` | `1.25rem` | | `--instui-spacing-space-sm` | `` | `0.5rem` | ## Related - [pill](/api/css/pill.md) — The inline label-chip counterpart.

# mui

`@pantoken/mui` — theme MUI (Material UI) with Instructure tokens.

[toMuiTheme](functions/toMuiTheme.md) maps any IR onto MUI theme options; [lightTheme](variables/lightTheme.md) and [darkTheme](variables/darkTheme.md)
are the ready-made `rebrand` options. Pass them to MUI's `createTheme`.

## Példa

```tsx
import { createTheme, ThemeProvider } from "@mui/material/styles";
import { lightTheme } from "@pantoken/mui";
const theme = createTheme(lightTheme);
<ThemeProvider theme={theme}>...</ThemeProvider>;
```

## Interfészek

- [MuiPaletteColor](interfaces/MuiPaletteColor.md)
- [PantokenThemeOptions](interfaces/PantokenThemeOptions.md)

## Változók

- [lightTheme](variables/lightTheme.md)
- [darkTheme](variables/darkTheme.md)

## Függvények

- [toMuiTheme](functions/toMuiTheme.md)

## Hivatkozások

### Mode

Re-exports [Mode](../../../packages/core/src/type-aliases/Mode.md)

***

### default

Renames and re-exports [lightTheme](variables/lightTheme.md)
entries.55b8f4208b0580bd19d83ce8cd617b421de84d6e:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / tray

# Változó: tray

> `const` **tray**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-tray>` — a panel docked to a viewport edge, backed by a native `[popover]` (top layer +
light-dismiss). `placement` maps to `-placement-<value>` (e.g. `start`, `end`, `top`, `bottom`) and
`size` to `-size-<value>`; a light-DOM `popovertarget` button toggles it by id. Content goes in the
default slot.

## Példa

```html
<button popovertarget="nav">Menu</button>
<instui-tray id="nav" placement="start" size="small">…</instui-tray>
```

# icons

`@pantoken/icons` — an ergonomic view over the IR's `<image>` tokens.

This is not a second source; it filters the canonical IR from `@pantoken/tokens` to the icon
tokens and decodes each data-URI back to inline SVG, exposing a shape close to the

**A logó képtokenek hozzáadása CSS összeállításkor a toCss segítségével**

```ts
import { toCss } from "@pantoken/css";

import { logosPlugin } from "@pantoken/plugin-logos";

[pantoken](../../../index.md) / figma

# figma

`@pantoken/figma` — convert the Instructure token IR into a Figma Változók payload.

It produces one variable collection with `light`/`dark` modes: colour tokens become `COLOR`
variables (RGBA 0–1), dimensions/numbers become `FLOAT`, everything else `STRING`. Icons are
excluded (they'd be Figma components, not variables). Feed [toFigmaVariables](functions/toFigmaVariables.md) to a Figma
plugin (the Változók plugin API) or the Változók REST API — the README has the plugin glue.

## Interfészek

- [FigmaColor](interfaces/FigmaColor.md)
- [FigmaVariable](interfaces/FigmaVariable.md)
- [FigmaVariablesPayload](interfaces/FigmaVariablesPayload.md)
- [ToFigmaOptions](interfaces/ToFigmaOptions.md)

## Függvények

- [toFigmaColor](functions/toFigmaColor.md)
- [toFigmaVariables](functions/toFigmaVariables.md)

## Hivatkozások

# CSS: form-field-group `.instui-form-field-group` — A `
` group with a legend, a column or inline layout, and configurable spacing. **Forrás:** [form-field-group.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/form-field-group.css) ## Accessibility Renders a native `
` with a ``, so the legend text names the whole group for assistive tech. ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/form-field-group.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
Shipping address
All fields are used for delivery only.
``` ## Structure ```text .instui-form-field-group.-layout-columns.-col-spacing-medium legend form-field (component) form-field-messages (component) ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-form-field-group.-layout-columns.-col-spacing-medium"]:::cssdoc-root n1("legend"):::cssdoc-part n2(["form-field"]):::cssdoc-component n3(["form-field-messages"]):::cssdoc-component n0 --> n1 n0 --> n2 n0 --> n3 click n2 "/api/css/form-field.md" click n3 "/api/css/form-field-messages.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-col-spacing-large` | Large column gap. | | `.-col-spacing-medium` | Medium column gap. | | `.-col-spacing-none` | No column gap. | | `.-col-spacing-small` | Small column gap. | | `.-layout-aligned` | Align child fields to a shared grid. | | `.-layout-columns` | Lay child fields out in columns. | | `.-layout-inline` | Lay child fields inline, in a row. | | `.-required` | Mark the group as required. | | `.-row-spacing-large` | Large row gap. | | `.-row-spacing-medium` | Medium row gap. | | `.-row-spacing-none` | No row gap. | | `.-row-spacing-small` | Small row gap. | | `.-v-align-bottom` | Bottom-align the fields. | | `.-v-align-middle` | Middle-align the fields. | | `.-v-align-top` | Top-align the fields. | ## Pseudo-elements | Pseudo-element | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `::after` | Renders the decorative required-field asterisk after the legend text when the group is required. | ## Conditions | Type | Query | Leírás | | --- | --- | --- | | supports | `(grid-template-columns: subgrid)` | — | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-asterisk-color` | `` | `light-dark(#CF1F24, #FA917F)` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-font-family` | `[ \| ]#` | `Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-font-size` | `` | `1rem` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-font-weight` | `` | `400` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-gap-inputs` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-gap-primitives` | `` | `0.5rem` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-line-height` | `` | `1.125rem` | | `--instui-component-form-field-layout-text-color` | `` | `light-dark(#273540, #ffffff)` | | `--instui-spacing-space-lg` | `` | `1rem` | | `--instui-spacing-space-md` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-spacing-space-sm` | `` | `0.5rem` | ## Browser support - The `-layout-aligned` mode uses CSS subgrid behind an `@supports` guard; where subgrid is unsupported, the fields fall back to their own stacked layout. ## Subcomponents - [form-field](/api/css/form-field.md) - [form-field-messages](/api/css/form-field-messages.md) ## Related - [form-field](/api/css/form-field.md) — The single field this group repeats. - [radio-input-group](/api/css/radio-input-group.md) — Groups radio inputs under a legend.

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / visual-debug # visual-debug `@pantoken/plugin-visual-debug` — the CSS for InstUI's `withVisualDebug` prop. InstUI's layout primitives (View, Flex, Grid, List, …) take `withVisualDebug` to outline the box and its children while debugging a layout. This plugin emits a single dash-prefixed modifier, `-with-visual-debug`, that works on any element (compound with any base — `.instui-view -with-visual-debug`). The outline colour is a `--pantoken-visual-debug-color` custom property (default a bright magenta) so it's easy to retint. ## Példa ```ts import { toCss } from "@pantoken/css"; import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens"; import { visualDebug } from "@pantoken/plugin-visual-debug"; const css = toCss(byTheme("rebrand"), { plugins: [visualDebug()] }); //
…
``` ## Interfészek - [VisualDebugOptions](interfaces/VisualDebugOptions.md) ## Függvények - [visualDebug](functions/visualDebug.md) ## Hivatkozások ### default Renames and re-exports [visualDebug](functions/visualDebug.md)

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/utils/src](../index.md) / danglingReferences

# Függvény: danglingReferences()

> **danglingReferences**(`css`): `string`[]

Önállóság-ellenőrzés: `--instui-*` nevek, amelyekre `var()` hivatkozik egy stíluslapban, de az soha nem
definiálja őket (sem `@property` regisztrációként, sem `--x:` deklarációként). Rendezve; az üres eredmény azt jelenti, hogy minden
hivatkozás ugyanazon a kimeneten belül feloldható. Önálló stíluslapokhoz használható (css, pendo).

## Paraméterek

### css

`string`

A generált stíluslap.

## Visszatérési érték

`string`[]

A lógó hivatkozások nevei.

## Példa

```ts
import { danglingReferences } from "@pantoken/utils";

// Self-contained: the referenced property is also defined here.
danglingReferences("@property --instui-a {} .b { color: var(--instui-a); }"); // → []

// Dangling: `--instui-b` is referenced but never defined.
danglingReferences(
  ":root { --instui-a: red; } .b { color: var(--instui-a); background: var(--instui-b); }",
); // → ["--instui-b"]
```

# Változó: popover

> `const` **popover**: [`ElementDefinition`](../interfaces/ElementDefinition.md)

`<instui-popover>` — a floating surface. Like `<instui-context-view>`, the host is a native
`[popover]` (top layer + light-dismiss), so a light-DOM `popovertarget` button can toggle it by id.
Content goes in the default slot.

## Példa

```html
<button popovertarget="menu">Options</button>
<instui-popover id="menu">…</instui-popover>
```

[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [packages/core/src](../index.md) / resolveReferences

# Függvény: resolveReferences()

> **resolveReferences**(`tokens`, `mode?`): `Map`\<`string`, `string`\>

Minden tokent egy konkrét, egymódú értékre old fel: kibontja a `var(...)` láncokat és
összecsukja a `light-dark()` értéket a kiválasztott `mode` értékre.

## Paraméterek

### tokens

readonly [`Token`](../interfaces/Token.md)[]

Az IR.

### mode?

[`Mode`](../type-aliases/Mode.md) = `"light"`

A `light-dark()` melyik oldalát tartsa meg (alapértelmezés: `"light"`).

## Visszatérési érték

`Map`\<`string`, `string`\>

A tokennév és a konkrét érték közötti leképezés.

## Példa

**A felépített IR feloldása konkrét sötét módú értékekre**

```ts
import { buildTokens, resolveReferences } from "@pantoken/core";

const resolved = resolveReferences(buildTokens(), "dark");
resolved.get("--instui-color-background-base"); // → a concrete "#…" value
```

# CSS: popover `.instui-popover` — An elevated surface for a native `[popover]`, positioned with CSS anchor positioning. **Forrás:** [popover.css](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/popover.css) ## Usage ```css @import "@pantoken/components/components.css"; @import "@pantoken/components/popover.css"; ``` ## Példák ```html
Share this page

A popover is a lightweight surface anchored to a trigger. This one uses the native popover attribute.

``` ## Structure ```text .instui-popover heading (component) text (component) code ``` ```mermaid flowchart TD n0[".instui-popover"]:::cssdoc-root n1(["heading"]):::cssdoc-component n2(["text"]):::cssdoc-component n3("code"):::cssdoc-part n0 --> n1 n2 --> n3 n0 --> n2 click n1 "/api/css/heading.md" click n2 "/api/css/text.md" classDef cssdoc-root fill:#eef2ff,stroke:#6366f1,color:#1e1b4b; classDef cssdoc-part fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#0f172a; classDef cssdoc-slot fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#4ade80,color:#14532d; classDef cssdoc-component fill:#fff7ed,stroke:#fb923c,color:#7c2d12; ``` ## Modifiers | Modifier | Leírás | | --- | --- | | `.-placement-bottom` | Sit below the anchor. | | `.-placement-end` | Sit at the end (inline-end) of the anchor. | | `.-placement-start` | Sit at the start (inline-start) of the anchor. | | `.-placement-top` | Sit above the anchor. | ## Conditions | Type | Query | Leírás | | --- | --- | --- | | supports | `(position-area: block-end)` | — | | supports | `(transition-behavior: allow-discrete)` | — | ## Tokens consumed | Token | Type | Value | | --- | --- | --- | | `--instui-border-width-sm` | `` | `0.0625rem` | | `--instui-color-background-elevated-surface-base` | `` | `light-dark(#ffffff, #171B21)` | | `--instui-color-text-base` | `` | `light-dark(#273540, #F2F4F5)` | | `--instui-component-popover-border-color` | `` | `light-dark(#8D959F, #6A7883)` | | `--instui-component-popover-border-radius` | `` | `0.75rem` | | `--instui-elevation-above` | `[ inset? && {2,4} && ? ]# \| none` | `0 0.1875rem 0.375rem light-dark(rgba(35,68,101,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), 0 0.1875rem 0.375rem light-dark(rgba(35,68,101,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.3))` | | `--instui-spacing-space-sm` | `` | `0.5rem` | ## Browser support - Uses CSS anchor positioning (`position-anchor`/`position-area`) and the native `[popover]` API, both Chromium-only today; an `@supports` guard keeps the placement inert elsewhere, where the UA centres the popover in the top layer. ## Subcomponents - [heading](/api/css/heading.md) - [text](/api/css/text.md) ## Related - [tooltip](/api/css/tooltip.md) — A tooltip is a smaller, hover- or focus-triggered anchored surface. - [context-view](/api/css/context-view.md) — Context view is a related anchored surface with a pointer.
entries.6634ecc4b60e939b63d01221e6d0698425f5ad8a:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / register

# Függvény: register()

> **register**(`target?`, `options?`): `void`

Register the pantoken custom elements. No-op when there is no DOM (SSR / build), so this module
is safe to import anywhere.

## Paraméterek

### target?

[`ElementRegistry`](../interfaces/ElementRegistry.md) \| `undefined`

The registry to define into (defaults to `globalThis.customElements`).

### options?

`prefix` sets the tag prefix, mirroring the CSS layer: pass a non-empty string like
  `x` for `<x-icon>`. A prefix is always applied (a custom-element name must contain a hyphen), so an
  omitted, empty, or nullish prefix falls back to the default `instui` (`<instui-icon>`).

#### prefix?

`string` \| `null`

## Visszatérés

`void`

## Példa

```ts
import { register } from "@pantoken/web-components";
import "@pantoken/css"; // defines the --instui-* custom properties the elements read

register(); // <instui-button>, <instui-icon>, …
register(customElements, { prefix: "x" }); // <x-button>, <x-icon>, …
```

# CSS: text-area

`.instui-text-area` — A styled, resizable native `<textarea>` with the same states and sizes as the text input.

**Forrás:** [text-area.ts](https://github.com/thedannywahl/pantoken/blob/main/formats/components/src/components/text-area.ts)

## Usage

```css
@import "@pantoken/components/components.css";
@import "@pantoken/components/text-area.css";
```

## Példák

```html
<textarea class="instui-text-area" placeholder="Write a comment…"></textarea>
```

## Modifiers

| Modifier | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `.-disabled` | Disabled state. |
| `.-invalid` | Invalid (error) state. |
| `.-readonly` | Read-only state. |
| `.-size-large` | Large. Long-form alias of `-size-lg`. |
| `.-size-lg` | Large. |
| `.-size-sm` | Small. |
| `.-size-small` | Small. Long-form alias of `-size-sm`. |
| `.-success` | Success (valid) state. |

## Pseudo-elements

| Pseudo-element | Leírás |
| --- | --- |
| `::placeholder` | The placeholder text, in a muted color that shifts on hover. |

| --- | --- |
| `:disabled` | — |

entries.6c7513303d2e7b3d868bae6970151f9415c5747c:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / [renderers/web-components/src](../index.md) / foundationCss

# Függvény: foundationCss()

> **foundationCss**(): `string`

The `:root` custom-property block that bundles the elevation scale (`--instui-elevation-*`) and the
focus-outline system (`--instui-focus-outline-*`). The component CSS references these, but the token
sheet (`@pantoken/css`) doesn't carry them — they live in the components/base layer. Because custom
properties pierce the shadow boundary, declaring them once at `:root` makes every element's shadow
inherit them, so shadows, focus rings, etc. work with nothing loaded but this module + a token sheet.
[register](register.md) injects it client-side; export it too so SSR can inline it up front.

## Visszatérés

`string`

A `:root { … }` CSS string.

## Példa

```ts
import { foundationCss } from "@pantoken/web-components";
// SSR: `<style>${foundationCss()}</style>` in <head>.
```

entries.6ed9d5b2eaef3a38a20ea765b15402aea04bd195:
[pantoken](../../../../index.md) / stacking

# stacking

`@pantoken/plugin-stacking` — named z-index depths.

InstUI's `View` exposes a stacking scale (`deepest`, `below`, `above`, `topmost`) so layers stack
predictably instead of by hand-tuned magic numbers. This plugin surfaces that scale two ways: it
emits `--instui-stacking-<level>` tokens (resolved to concrete z-index values from the shipped
`--instui-component-view-stacking-*` tokens), and a matching set of `.instui-stack-<level>` utility
classes.

Both hooks are defined, so the consumer chooses the layer: add it to `buildTokens` to bake the
`--instui-stacking-*` records into every output, or to `toCss` (the css hook self-defines them, so
the `.instui-stack-*` classes stand alone).

## Példa

```ts
import { toCss } from "@pantoken/css";
import { byTheme } from "@pantoken/tokens";
import { stacking } from "@pantoken/plugin-stacking";

const css = toCss(byTheme("rebrand"), { plugins: [stacking()] });
// :root { --instui-stacking-topmost: … } + .instui-stack-topmost { z-index: … }
```

## Interfészek

- [StackingOptions](interfaces/StackingOptions.md)

## Változók

- [STACKING\_LEVELS](variables/STACKING_LEVELS.md)

## Függvények

- [stacking](functions/stacking.md)

## Hivatkozások

### default

Renames and re-exports [stacking](functions/stacking.md)
